prediction: invariant (ii): price R2 ~ 0 at <=1d while rate-limit/latency carry the shock; P2 baseline: diurnal share ~0 for price, positive for congestion
claim_boundary: Hot-model panel only; request_count_30m is a rolling window (attenuates high-frequency loadings toward zero for ALL outcomes, so the ratio, not the level, is the statistic). Demand innovations are not exogenous shocks. Loadings/diurnal shares for price are conditional on the small subset of endpoints whose price moved at all — read them jointly with the ever-moved shares.
